# Hot Memory — active, high-impact facts (compiled view; sources cited)

Facts here are current as of the last knowledge build; each cites its canonical owner.
Resolved/superseded facts are removed, not archived here (history lives in `memory/`).

## Paywall program (owner-gated; the single most misunderstood area)

- **2026-07-12 owner supersession** (`docs/features/paypal-donations-and-paid-results/22-go-no-go.md`):
  env-gated PayPal Orders v2 paywall is APPROVED for sandbox (SANDBOX-GO). Capture-at-consumption
  replaces the old "durable order store + webhooks" gates. Blank `PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID/SECRET`
  (default) = paywall off = fully free game; e2e default asserts the free flow.
- **LIVE is NOT approved.** Four open conditions: deployed HTTPS origin; Business account +
  `PAYPAL_ENV=live` only after sandbox sign-off; owner-approved en+ar copy revision (the i18n
  catalog still says "completely free" while the payment step charges `{price}`); recorded live
  smoke test. A premature live attempt failed with `COMPLIANCE_VIOLATION` (commit `5cd43f6`).
- Never add persistence, webhooks, client-side price, or order-id trust here without the
  program's threat model (`19-threat-model-paywall.md`); the price is server-authoritative
  (`PAYMENT_PRICE_VALUE`), order ids match `^[A-Z0-9-]{8,64}$`, capture verifies status,
  amount, currency, and `custom_id === requestId`.

## Recently landed (agents commonly assume otherwise)

- **Multi-provider AI routing exists**: `AiRouterService` walks env-configured
  `provider:model` chains per step (Gemini + OpenAI-compatible providers via one adapter);
  photo-carrying calls dispatch only to vision-capable entries (fail-closed); sampled
  metrics-only shadow runs. Owner: `apps/api/src/modules/ai/adapters/`.
- **Multi-tab SSE stream isolation** landed on main (per-tab request ids, overload + cancel
  paths). Check `apps/api/src/modules/game/application/analyze-game-stream.use-case.ts` before
  touching streaming.
- **Frontend anatomy migration is COMPLETE**: `apps/web/src` is fully on
  modules/packages/shared; there is no legacy frontend left, and the frontend architecture
  ESLint plugins govern the whole surface.
- **The knowledge OS is live**: `.ai/` is generated by `npm run knowledge:build`; authored
  routing lives in `knowledge/`. Never edit `.ai/` by hand.

## Standing traps (from memory/known-pitfalls.md and recent work)

- `npm run lint`/typed tooling needs `packages/shared/dist` — run `npm run build:shared` first
  (hooks do this; ad-hoc eslint invocations must too).
- The API entrypoint is CommonJS — `unicorn/prefer-top-level-await` is off for it; don't
  "modernize" it.
- ClamAV fails closed **whenever enabled** (any environment), stricter than rules/15's
  "production" phrasing — the stricter behavior is the intended one.
- Uploads use multer memory storage; there is never a temp file to clean on disk — the wipe is
  a buffer zero-fill (`upload-buffer-cleanup.util.ts`).
- Repo-wide `enum`, inline eslint-disable, and hardcoded model ids are build-breaking; the
  contradiction checker (`npm run knowledge:contradictions`) also hunts them.

## Open process debt

- Paywall program artifacts incomplete (6 of the required set; see

  `NEXT_PUBLIC_PAYMENT_PRICE_VALUE`) when editing.
